feats.name: Actor
feats.description: Skilled at mimicry and dramatics. +1 CHA (max 20). Advantage on Deception and Performance when trying to pass as a different person. Mimic speech of a person or sounds of a creature (after 1 min listening). Listeners detect mimicry with Insight vs. Deception.

feats.name: Alert
feats.description: Always on the lookout for danger. +5 to initiative rolls. Can't be surprised while conscious. Other creatures don't gain advantage on attack rolls against you from being hidden.

feats.name: Athlete
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX (max 20). Standing up costs only 5 ft of movement. Climbing doesn't cost extra movement. Running jump after 5 ft move instead of 10 ft.

feats.name: Charger
feats.description: When you use your action to Dash, you can use a bonus action to either make one melee weapon attack or shove a creature. +5 damage on the attack if you moved 10+ ft in a straight line before.
benefits: Bonus attack or shove after Dash

feats.name: Crossbow Expert
feats.description: Ignore loading property of crossbows. No disadvantage when within 5 ft of hostile creature. When you use Attack action with one-handed weapon, bonus action attack with hand crossbow.

feats.name: Defensive Duelist
feats.description: When wielding a finesse weapon and attacked, use reaction to add proficiency bonus to AC for that attack.
benefits: Reaction: +PB to AC vs one attack (finesse weapon required)

feats.name: Dual Wielder
feats.description: +1 AC while wielding melee weapons in both hands. Can use two-weapon fighting even when weapons aren't light. Draw or stow two weapons at once.

feats.name: Dungeon Delver
feats.description: Advantage on Perception and Investigation checks to detect secret doors. Advantage on saves vs. traps. Resistance to trap damage. Travel at normal pace while searching for traps.

feats.name: Durable
feats.description: +1 CON (max 20). When rolling a Hit Die for HP recovery during short rest, minimum equals twice your CON modifier (minimum 2).

feats.name: Elemental Adept (Fire)
feats.description: Spells ignore resistance to fire damage. When you roll fire damage, treat 1s as 2s.
benefits: Treat 1s as 2s on fire damage rolls

feats.name: Elemental Adept (Cold)
feats.description: Spells ignore resistance to cold damage. When you roll cold damage, treat 1s as 2s.
benefits: Treat 1s as 2s on cold damage rolls

feats.name: Elemental Adept (Lightning)
feats.description: Spells ignore resistance to lightning damage. When you roll lightning damage, treat 1s as 2s.
benefits: Treat 1s as 2s on lightning damage rolls

feats.name: Elemental Adept (Acid)
feats.description: Spells ignore resistance to acid damage. When you roll acid damage, treat 1s as 2s.
benefits: Treat 1s as 2s on acid damage rolls

feats.name: Grappler
feats.description: Advantage on attack rolls against grappled creatures. Use action to try to pin a grappled creature (both restrained until escape).

feats.name: Great Weapon Master
feats.description: On critical hit or reducing a creature to 0 HP with a melee weapon, bonus action attack. Before making a melee attack with heavy weapon: take -5 to hit for +10 damage.
benefits: Bonus attack on crit or kill

feats.name: Healer
feats.description: Use Healer's Kit to stabilize a creature and restore 1 HP. Use Healer's Kit as action: creature regains 1d6+4+creature's max HD HP. Can't benefit from this until a short or long rest.
benefits: Healer's Kit: 1d6+4+HD HP (once per rest per creature)

feats.name: Heavily Armored
feats.description: +1 STR (max 20). Gain proficiency with heavy armor.

feats.name: Heavy Armor Master
feats.description: +1 STR (max 20). While wearing heavy armor, nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage reduced by 3.
benefits: Reduce nonmagical weapon damage by 3 in heavy armor

feats.name: Inspiring Leader
feats.description: Spend 10 minutes inspiring up to 6 friendly creatures. Each gains temp HP equal to your level + CHA mod. Creatures can't benefit again until they finish a short or long rest.
benefits: 10 min: up to 6 allies gain level+CHA temp HP (1/short rest per creature)

feats.name: Keen Mind
feats.description: +1 INT (max 20). Always know which way is north, hours until sunrise/sunset. Recall anything seen/heard in last month perfectly.

feats.name: Lightly Armored
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX (max 20). Gain proficiency with light armor.

feats.name: Linguist
feats.description: +1 INT (max 20). Learn 3 languages of your choice. Create written ciphers. Others need INT check vs. DC (8+INT mod+PB) to understand.

feats.name: Lucky
feats.description: 3 luck points per long rest. Spend to roll an extra d20 on attack, ability check, or save (before outcome known). Choose which d20 to use. Spend when attacked to force attacker to reroll.

feats.name: Mage Slayer
feats.description: When a creature within 5 ft casts a spell, reaction to make a melee weapon attack. When you damage a concentrating creature, it has disadvantage on the CON save. Advantage on saves vs. spells from creatures within 5 ft.
benefits: Disadvantage on concentration saves after your hits
Advantage on saves vs nearby casters

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
feats.description: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 first-level spell from the Wizard list. Cast the 1st-level spell once per long rest without a spell slot. INT is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
feats.description: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 first-level spell from the Cleric list. Cast the 1st-level spell once per long rest without a slot. WIS is your spellcasting ability.

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Druid)
feats.description: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 first-level spell from the Druid list. Cast the 1st-level spell once per long rest without a slot. WIS is your spellcasting ability.

feats.name: Martial Adept
feats.description: Learn 2 maneuvers from the Battle Master archetype. Gain 1 superiority die (d6). Recover on short or long rest. Save DC = 8 + PB + STR or DEX mod.

feats.name: Medium Armor Master
feats.description: No disadvantage on Stealth with medium armor. +3 DEX bonus to AC in medium armor (instead of +2).
benefits: No stealth disadvantage in medium armor

feats.name: Mobile
feats.description: Speed increases by 10 ft. Difficult terrain doesn't slow you when Dashing. When you make a melee attack, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature for the rest of turn.
benefits: No difficult terrain penalty when Dashing

feats.name: Moderately Armored
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX (max 20). Gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.

feats.name: Mounted Combatant
feats.description: Advantage on melee attacks against unmounted creatures smaller than your mount. Force an attack targeting your mount to target you instead. Your mount makes DEX saves with advantage; takes no damage on success.
benefits: Redirect attacks from mount to self
Mount has advantage on DEX saves

feats.name: Observant
feats.description: +1 INT or WIS (max 20). Read lips if you can see the mouth. +5 bonus to passive Perception and passive Investigation.

feats.name: Polearm Master
feats.description: Bonus action attack with butt of glaive/halberd/quarterstaff (1d4 bludgeoning). Creatures entering your reach provoke opportunity attacks.

feats.name: Resilient (Constitution)
feats.description: +1 CON (max 20). Gain proficiency in CON saving throws (essential for concentration spells).

feats.name: Resilient (Wisdom)
feats.description: +1 WIS (max 20). Gain proficiency in WIS saving throws.

feats.name: Resilient (Dexterity)
feats.description: +1 DEX (max 20). Gain proficiency in DEX saving throws.

feats.name: Ritual Caster (Wizard)
feats.description: Acquire a ritual book with 2 first-level ritual spells from the Wizard list. Add new rituals to book (spell level ≤ half your level rounded up). Cast rituals from book (10 min extra casting time, no slot).

feats.name: Savage Attacker
feats.description: Once per turn when rolling melee weapon damage, reroll all damage dice and use either result.
benefits: 1/turn: reroll melee damage dice, keep higher

feats.name: Sentinel
feats.description: Opportunity attacks reduce creature speed to 0 for the turn. Creatures can't Disengage to avoid your OAs. When a creature attacks someone other than you within 5 ft, reaction to make a melee weapon attack.
benefits: Disengage doesn't work vs your OA
Reaction attack when ally attacked nearby

feats.name: Sharpshooter
feats.description: Ignore long range disadvantage. Ranged attacks ignore half and three-quarters cover. Before attack: take -5 to hit for +10 damage.

feats.name: Shield Master
feats.description: If you take the Attack action, bonus action to shove with your shield. Add shield's AC to DEX saves vs effects targeting only you. Reaction: no damage instead of half on DEX save success (while carrying a shield).
benefits: Bonus shove with shield after Attack
Reaction: avoid DEX save damage entirely

feats.name: Skilled
feats.description: Gain proficiency in any combination of 3 skills or tools.
benefits: Proficiency in 3 skills or tools of your choice

feats.name: Skulker
feats.description: Try to hide when lightly obscured. Ranged attacks don't reveal position when missing. Dim light doesn't impose disadvantage on Perception checks.
benefits: Missed ranged attacks don't reveal position
No perception penalty in dim light

feats.name: Spell Sniper
feats.description: Double the range of spells requiring attack rolls. Ignore half and three-quarters cover for spell attacks. Learn one cantrip requiring an attack roll from any class list.

feats.name: Tavern Brawler
feats.description: +1 STR or CON (max 20). Proficiency with improvised weapons and unarmed strikes. Unarmed strike: 1d4 + STR. Bonus action to grapple after unarmed or improvised weapon hit.

feats.name: Tough
feats.description: HP maximum increases by 2 for each level (past and future). Essentially +2 HP per level.
benefits: +2 max HP per level (current and future)

feats.name: War Caster
feats.description: Advantage on CON saves to maintain concentration. Perform somatic components with weapons/shield in hand. When creature triggers OA, cast a spell instead (one action spell, targeting only that creature).

feats.name: Weapon Master
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX (max 20). Gain proficiency with 4 weapons of your choice.

feats.name: Aberrant Dragonmark
feats.description: +1 CON (max 20). Learn a cantrip and 1st-level spell from the Sorcerer list. Cast 1st-level spell with this feat 1/long rest. At will: 1d4+CON damage to self for +1 spell level. Instability: 1/day disturbing manifestation.
benefits: Risk higher spell level at HP cost

feats.name: Artificer Initiate
feats.description: Learn a cantrip and 1st-level spell from the Artificer list. Cast 1st-level spell once per long rest. Gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools. INT is your spellcasting ability.

feats.name: Blade Mastery
feats.description: +1 to attack rolls with swords, axes, and whips. When you use the Dodge action, +1 AC bonus if wielding a sword, axe, or whip. Opportunity attacks with these weapons have advantage.
benefits: +1 AC while Dodging with these weapons

feats.name: Bountiful Luck
feats.description: When an ally within 30 ft rolls a 1 on a d20, use your reaction to let them reroll and use the new result. Doesn't cost a Lucky feat point.
benefits: Reaction: ally rerolls 1s within 30 ft (free, unlimited)

feats.name: Chef
feats.description: +1 CON or WIS. Proficiency with cook's utensils. Short rest cooking: up to PB creatures each regain 1d8 extra HP from HD. After long rest: cook treats = PB (each grants 1d8 temp HP, last 8h).

feats.name: Crusher
feats.description: +1 STR or CON. Once per turn on bludgeoning hit: push creature 5 ft. On critical bludgeoning hit: all attacks against that creature have advantage until start of your next turn.

feats.name: Elven Accuracy
feats.description: +1 DEX, INT, WIS, or CHA. When you have advantage on an attack roll using DEX, INT, WIS, or CHA, reroll one of the dice and use the highest of the three.

feats.name: Fade Away
feats.description: +1 INT or DEX. When you take damage, reaction to turn invisible until start of your next turn or until you attack/cast. 1/short rest.
benefits: Reaction: turn invisible after taking damage (1/short rest)

feats.name: Fey Teleportation
feats.description: +1 INT or CHA. Learn Misty Step and Sylvan. Cast Misty Step once per short rest without a spell slot.

feats.name: Flames of Phlegethos
feats.description: +1 INT or CHA. When casting fire spells, reroll any 1s. Bonus action: wreath yourself in flames (1 fire damage to those hitting you in melee, +10 ft dim light) until end of next turn.
benefits: Bonus: flame wreath (1 fire dmg to melee attackers)

feats.name: Gift of the Chromatic Dragon
feats.description: Chromatic Infusion: bonus action imbue a weapon for 1 min (+1d4 acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison). Reactive Resistance: reaction to resistance one damage type when taking acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison (1/long rest).
benefits: Bonus: imbue weapon +1d4 elemental damage (1 min)
Reaction: resistance to elemental damage (1/long rest)

feats.name: Gift of the Gem Dragon
feats.description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Telekinetic Reprisal: reaction when hit to deal 2d8 force damage to attacker and push it 10 ft (STR save vs 8+PB+chosen ability). 1/long rest.
benefits: Reaction: 2d8 force + push 10 ft when hit (1/long rest)

feats.name: Gift of the Metallic Dragon
feats.description: Learn Cure Wounds. Cast without slot 1/long rest. Use reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack roll against ally within 5 ft (once per long rest).
benefits: Reaction: disadvantage on ally attack (1/long rest)

feats.name: Gunner
feats.description: +1 DEX. Proficiency with firearms. Ignore loading for firearms. No disadvantage at 5 ft with ranged weapons.

feats.name: Infernal Constitution
feats.description: +1 CON. Resistance to cold and poison damage. Advantage on saves vs. being poisoned.

feats.name: Orcish Fury
feats.description: +1 STR or CON. Once per turn, extra weapon damage die on attack. When Relentless Endurance activates, bonus action attack as reaction.
benefits: Bonus attack when Relentless Endurance triggers

feats.name: Piercer
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX. Once per turn on piercing hit: reroll one damage die, use either. On critical: one extra piercing damage die.

feats.name: Poisoner
feats.description: Ignore poison resistance. Proficiency with poisoner's kit. Bonus action to coat weapon with poison (1d8 poison, CON save DC 14 or poisoned for 1 min). 1/short rest.
benefits: Bonus: coat weapon (1d8 poison, poisoned condition)

feats.name: Shadow Touched
feats.description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion or Necromancy spell. Cast each once per long rest for free.

feats.name: Silver-Tongued
feats.description: +1 CHA. Proficiency in Deception (or double if already proficient). When you make a Deception check, take a minimum of 10 on the roll.

feats.name: Slasher
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX. Once per turn on slashing hit: reduce speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn. On critical: disadvantage on all attacks until start of your next turn.
benefits: Crit: target has disadvantage on attacks

feats.name: Squat Nimbleness
feats.description: +1 STR or DEX. Speed increases by 5 ft. Proficiency in Athletics or Acrobatics. Advantage on checks to escape grapples.

feats.name: Stealthy
feats.description: +1 DEX. Proficiency in Stealth (or double if already proficient). When you make a Stealth check, take a minimum of 10 on the roll.

feats.name: Strike of the Giants
feats.description: After hitting with melee weapon: invoke giant's power (PB uses/long rest). Hill: 1d6+STR push 15 ft. Frost: 1d6+CON slow (speed halved, no reactions). Stone: 1d6+CON blind until turn end. Storm: 1d6+STR fly 60 ft until turn end.
benefits: Choose giant power on melee hit

feats.name: Svirfneblin Magic
feats.description: Cast Nondetection on self at will without a spell slot. Also gain innate spellcasting: Blindness/Deafness, Blur, Disguise Self 1/day each.

feats.name: Telekinetic
feats.description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn Mage Hand (invisible hand). Bonus action to push/pull a creature 5 ft with telekinesis (STR save vs 8+PB+modifier to resist).

feats.name: Telepathic
feats.description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Telepathically speak with any creature you can see within 60 ft (they don't need to share a language). Cast Detect Thoughts 1/long rest for free.

feats.name: Wood Elf Magic
feats.description: Learn Longstrider and Pass Without Trace. Cast each once per long rest for free. Also learn one Druid cantrip.
